description: You are a lighting technician configuring a 'SuperSpot 2000' fixture. Using the Electrical Engineering Calculations app, calculate the total luminous flux (Lumens) for a stage spotlight with a center-beam luminous intensity of 12,000 Candela (cd) and a beam angle of 40 degrees. Save the result to /sdcard/spotlight_results.txt in the format: 'Lumens: <value>'.
